overview.title: Health Check API
overview.purpose: This project provides a simple health-check API for monitoring basic server availability, intended for system administrators and devops teams.

components.name: API Server
components.description: Serves the health endpoint using Node.js and Express.
components.interface_summary: Externally, it interacts through the REST API endpoint '/health', responding with server health status.

api_reference.description: Checks server health and returns a status.

steps: Clone the repository to your local machine.

operations.health_check: Access /health endpoint. A response of HTTP 200 with { "status": "ok" } indicates the system is running correctly.
operations.logging: Logs server start in the console at info level, e.g., 'health api on 3000'.

common_issues.cause: Server is not running or there's a network issue.
common_issues.fix: Ensure Node.js server is running and check network connections.

documentation.summary: This documentation covers the Health Check API for system administrators and devops personnel, providing guidance on installation, operations, and known limitations of the service.
